subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Praise be to God that word hath come of thine arrival and of thy meeting with the loved ones of the All-Desired One, bringing joy and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی الحمد لله خبر وصول و حصول لقای احبای حضرت مقصود رسید و سبب فرح و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
